name: Auntie Lin's Pluto Coffee
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Fresh ground coffee (preferably chocolate mint)
recipeInstructions:
1. Freshly grind the coffee.
2. Brew using either Swiss chocolate or chocolate mint flavoring.
3. In a large mug, pour 2+ oz of 151 Rum into the bottom (reserve some to taste).
4. Pour hot coffee into the mug about three-quarters full.
5. Add Hagen-Daaz or Baileys Irish Cream.
6. Stir gently.
7. Top with fresh whipped cream and drizzle chocolate syrup over everything.
8. Enjoy!
